message:
✨ Add per-card error breakdown to analytics + separate card_id GA4 param (#2179)

- Adds `card_id` as a dedicated GA4 event parameter (instead of
  embedding it in error_detail string), making it queryable as a
  dimension in GA4 reports
- Adds new GA4 query for card-level error breakdown by customEvent:card_id
- Renders a "Card Error Breakdown" section on the analytics page with
  horizontal bar chart and table with sparkline trends per card
- Helps identify which specific cards crash most frequently

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
